title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Brûlée, Katakuri, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Luffy as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mr. Oven, do we really need this many ships

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: to line up the whole cake island?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way Sir Katakuri will let straw hat get away

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Tell that to Tamago and Mont-D'Or

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Of course, this is necessary Owen brother

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you believe it? The explosion in the Chateau was intentional

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though they're rookie they shouldn't be underestimated.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It will be a huge embarrassment, if somehow they were able to get away

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go and break every mirror on the island

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you don't want to break them, you can throw them in the ocean and get them back

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are no other mirror left on this island

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This guy's observation Haki... is getting to closer to mine

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 33 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
